scope: Canonical Slice inspector controls for pixel snapping, auto/fixed palettes, presets, reset and accessible feedback.

initial.summary: Pixel stage off. Source dimensions and colors remain unchanged.

rejected: Parallel palette state: all pixel setters commit through SliceGridController and the existing onCommitState host boundary.
Preset drift: PICO-8 selection renders eight exact swatches and fixed mode remains visible in the canonical data attributes.
Reset drift: reset returns disabled, size 16 and auto palette with no stale fixed palette.
Invisible failure: source-less controls are semantically disabled and summaries remain actionable; invalid custom sizes roll back to the committed value.
Layout/a11y regression: production Chrome reports zero user-visible body overflow, zero unlabeled interactive nodes and zero runtime/network errors.
adversarialAutopsy.boundary: Worker palette math is G5-02; large-image/performance budget is G5-04; process/results/export journeys are G6/G7.
